description: XSS via reflected user input in doGet; doPost has manual HTML entity escaping

expected.notes: request.getParameter("name") flows directly into out.println without escaping in doGet

source at 14:9 (request.getParameter("name") in doPost) reported flowing to out.println on line 17; however line 15 sanitizes via .replace("<","<").replace(">",">") so this is FP — scanner fails to recognize manual HTML entity escaping as sanitization
source at 7:9 (request.getParameter("name") in doGet) reported flowing to line 17 in doPost; cross-method taint leakage — scanner conflates same-named variables across different methods. FP.
